UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the steady, methodical approach of a reliable farmer who is patiently working the earth for long-term gains.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the knightly aspect or any sense of haste or urgency.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Pentacles card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, slow, contemplative, earthy, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the stubbornness and stagnation, the knight's inability to move forward despite his clutched pentacle.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the horse or the mud as they are symbols of the current state, not the focus.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Pentacles card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, Orchestral, Ambient, Strings, Harp, Reversed, Practical, Grounded, Stable, Potential, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Pentacles card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the methodical approach, focus on detail, and the balance between progress and nature
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the speed or urgency of the Knight's actions
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
